title: AwesomeGunsTexturepack
description: This is a texture pack for the Awesome Guns plugin
body:
This is a texture pack for minecraft versions 1.9-1.21.4.

What it adds? this texture pack adds new custom models of guns for the Awesome Guns plugin to make the plugin more fun and interesting.

Warning this pack will not work with beta v1 ,and v2 since in those updates the items have diffrent model ids. If you really want a pack for those versions you can change the ids in the .json files.

For more info on the plugin please check out the links bellow:
  
  Awesome Guns - https://modrinth.com/project/rnxveBcM
  
  Youtube channel - https://www.youtube.com/@might2you

Or join the discord.
